sections.paragraph:
Original: איזבל

Transliteration: 'ı̂yzebel

Phonetic: ee-zeh'-bel

BDB Definition:

Jezebel = "Baal exalts" or " Baal is husband to" or " unchaste"
  1. queen of Israel, wife of Ahab, daughter of Ethbaal

Origin: from H336 and H2083

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
